title: On the Obsolescence of Oracles
description: Why have the oracles fallen silent? Plutarch's characters debate: because the daemons have departed, or because the world is aging.
introduction: Why have the oracles fallen silent? Plutarch's characters debate: because the daemons have departed, or because the world is aging.

translation.text: The power of the spirit in the place has been exhausted, just as the earth itself grows old.
